name: Cross of Condemnation
flavorText: "And he bearing his cross went forth." — John 19:17
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mana, colors, and mechanics were added, but final tuning remains pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "It Is Finished" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.sourceNotes: A direct crucifixion image gives the cross card the right old-master focus.
